content_fingerprint: litellm signs all docker images with cosign in latest release candidate berriai has added cryptographic docker image signing to litellm letting teams verify they are pulling untampered containers before deployment berriai released v1 83 14 rc 1 of litellm on april 27 2026 the only substantive change in this release candidate being the introduction of docker image signing via the cosign tool all litellm container images distributed through the project s github container registry are now signed with a dedicated key introduced in commit 0112e53 the signing scheme offers two verification paths the
